title: Cost smell definition
description: Frozen v1 schema for a single cost-smell definition. One smell per YAML file. Unknown fields are rejected so a typo fails loudly instead of being silently ignored. Future additions to this schema must be optional fields only.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier. Lower-case kebab-case, optionally namespaced with a single 'owner/' prefix for community smells (for example 'my-org/spurious-system-edit').

title.description: Human-readable name shown in reports and on the library site.

severity.description: Impact level. 'info' is advisory, 'warn' is wasted spend, 'critical' is wasted spend or degraded quality that needs attention.

description.description: What the smell detects and why it costs money.

language.description: Query language. 'jsonpath' and 'sql' are evaluated against a run's event stream; 'builtin' is reserved for detectors that ship inside the package, where the query is documentary.

query.description: The detection expression. Must terminate in O(events x constant): no pathological cross-joins or nested full scans.

trigger_condition.description: Boolean condition over the query result that fires the smell, for example 'value > 0.10'.

suggested_policy.description: Name of a policy that remediates this smell, or null when no policy fix exists yet.

primary_category.description: Optional token-ledger category the smell primarily explains; null for run-shape or cross-run patterns.

evidence_query.description: Optional SQL or JSONPath expression that reproduces the smell's evidence for auditing.

evidence_kind.description: RESERVED. Set only by the savings-estimation worker; never authored by hand. Describes the strength of the savings evidence: 'simulation' recomputes a corrected ledger from anonymised shapes, 'replay_pair' is a measured before/after on the same input, 'production_pair' is a contributed and manually verified before/after.

estimated_savings.description: RESERVED. Set only by the savings-estimation worker; never authored by hand. Absent until savings have been estimated for this smell.

corpus_runs.description: Number of runs in the corpus the estimate was computed over.

triggered_in.description: Number of corpus runs in which this smell triggered.

estimated_potential_saved_avg_percent.description: Average potential saving as a percentage of run cost, were the recommendation applied.

estimated_potential_saved_nanodollars_pe.description: Average potential saving per triggering run, in nanodollars.

confidence.description: Confidence in the estimate, driven by corpus size and contributor count.

last_computed.description: Date the estimate was last computed (ISO-8601 date).
